name: Celonis Process Mining & Execution Management API
what_it_does: Celonis REST API for Process Mining and Execution Management System (EMS) platform. Enables AI agents to access process mining analysis and conformance checking data, handle execution app and action flow automation, retrieve process KPI and benchmarking data, manage business rule and deviation detection alerts, access object-centric process mining (OCPM) data, retrieve process simulation and what-if analysis, handle ML model and process prediction data, manage data pipeline and transformation workflows, access process variant and bottleneck analysis, and integrate process intelligence with ERP, CRM, and operational systems.
use_cases: Accessing process mining analysis and bottleneck detection from process intelligence agents
Handling execution app automation and action flows from process improvement agents
Retrieving conformance checking and deviation alerts from process governance agents
Integrating process intelligence with ERP and CRM from enterprise automation agents
not_for: Simple workflow automation without process mining and analysis needs
Small businesses without enterprise process complexity and data volume
Pure ETL or data integration without process behavior analysis
best_when: An enterprise using Celonis EMS wants AI agents to automate process intelligence, action flow execution, deviation detection, process improvement recommendations, and integration with source systems like SAP, Salesforce, and ServiceNow.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: Process mining automation that triggers action flows can modify operational data in ERP and CRM systems. Automated process interventions at scale require governance and rollback controls. Process data from ERP contains confidential business operations and financial data.

auth.notes: Celonis uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Application-level credentials with process mining, execution, and data integration scopes. Celonis Developer Hub with comprehensive API documentation. Python SDK for data pipeline and ML integration. Webhooks for action flow and alert events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise EMS subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise subscription; usage-based data volume pricing
pricing.notes: Munich, Germany. Founded 2011. Unicorn valued at $13B (2021). Market leader for process mining and execution management. Used by 1,000+ enterprises including BMW, Siemens, and Uber. Acquired multiple process mining and execution companies. Deep SAP integration heritage. Competes with Software AG Signavio and IBM Process Mining.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per application client; data pipeline throttling

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: Action flows can modify production ERP/CRM data — automated triggers require governance controls
Process mining data is sourced from ERP event logs — data extraction requires ERP connector and data volume planning
No public MCP server — Python SDK plus REST API with Celonis Developer Hub
Object-centric process mining (OCPM) is newer API surface — verify compatibility with customer EMS version
Large event log data volumes require async extraction patterns — not suitable for real-time API polling
SAP integration depth varies by SAP module and version — verify extraction connector compatibility
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise process and ERP event log data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Confidential business process data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Process mining and ERP event data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Enterprise process confidentiality.
